# Context Management Best Practices

> Proven patterns for managing context windows, session continuity, and knowledge persistence across AI coding sessions.

## Entries

- [Proactive Compaction and Session Handoff](compact-and-handoff.md): Use /compact at 50% context, create HANDOFF.md for multi-session work. FOUNDATIONAL.
- [Subagent Usage Patterns](subagent-patterns.md): Aggressively offload research to subagents with "why" context, parallelize explorations. RECOMMENDED.
- [Shared Agent Memory](agent-memory.md): Version-controlled .claude/agent-memory/ with patterns.md, decisions.md, debugging.md. RECOMMENDED.
